schemes.title: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
schemes.description: An initiative by the government of India in which all farmers will get up to ₹6,000 per year as minimum income support.
benefits: Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) into bank accounts

schemes.title: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
schemes.description: Providing health cover of ₹5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization to poor and vulnerable families.
benefits: Health cover up to ₹5,00,000 per family per year
Cashless access to health care services for the beneficiary at the point of service

schemes.title: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Credit-linked subsidy scheme aimed at generating self-employment opportunities through establishment of micro-enterprises.
benefits: Margin Money subsidy of 15% to 35% of project cost
Bank loan of 90% to 95% of the project cost

schemes.title: National Scheme of Incentive to Girls for Secondary Education
schemes.description: To promote enrollment of girl child in the age group of 14-18 at secondary stage, especially those who passed Class VIII.
benefits: Sum of ₹3000 deposited as fixed deposit
Withdrawal allowed upon reaching 18 years of age and passing 10th class.

schemes.title: Stand-up India Scheme
schemes.description: Facilitate bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 Crore to at least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise.
benefits: Bank loan between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 Crore

schemes.title: PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)
schemes.description: A special micro-credit facility to provide affordable loans to street vendors.
benefits: Interest subsidy of 7% per annum on regular repayment

schemes.title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY-U)
schemes.description: Provides central assistance to implementing agencies through States/UTs to provide houses to all eligible families against the validated demand.
benefits: Direct financial assistance for house construction

schemes.title: Digital India Internship Scheme
schemes.description: Opportunity for students to secure practical experience related to Ministry’s activities.

schemes.title: Upcoming: PM Universal Basic Youth Income
schemes.description: OVERVIEW: This is a proposed scheme currently under discussion by the government. It aims to provide a baseline digital allowance to all qualifying students to support digital learning access. *NOTE: This scheme is not yet approved and is purely under parliament discussion.*

schemes.title: Upcoming: National Agri-Drone Subsidy Initiative
schemes.description: OVERVIEW: Under discussion phase by the cabinet. This scheme aims to subsidize drone purchases for farmers to modernize pesticide administration and crop monitoring. *NOTE: This scheme is primarily in discussion phase, await final cabinet approval notification.*
benefits: Proposed 50% subsidy on agricultural drone purchases

schemes.title: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
schemes.description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers in case of crop loss due to natural calamities.

schemes.title: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
schemes.description: Pension scheme focused on workers in the unorganized sector.

schemes.title: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
schemes.description: Financial inclusion program providing bank accounts to unbanked citizens.

schemes.title: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
schemes.description: Provides LPG connections to women from economically weaker households.

schemes.title: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
schemes.description: Provides loans up to ₹10 lakh for micro and small enterprises.

schemes.title: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
schemes.description: Skill training initiative aimed at improving employability of youth.

schemes.title: National Health Mission (NHM)
schemes.description: Strengthens public healthcare systems across rural and urban India.

schemes.title: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
schemes.description: Accidental insurance scheme for Indian citizens.
benefits: Accident insurance cover up to ₹2 lakh

schemes.title: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
schemes.description: Life insurance scheme offering affordable coverage.

schemes.title: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
schemes.description: Encourages apprenticeship training to enhance employability.

schemes.title: National Greening Mission
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Environment, Forest & Climate Change
schemes.description: Focuses on afforestation and increasing green cover across India.

schemes.title: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.description: Savings scheme for girl child to build a secure future.

schemes.title: Jan Suraksha Schemes
schemes.description: Grouped social security schemes for citizens via insurance benefits.

schemes.title: National Jute Board Scheme
schemes.description: Supports jute farmers and promotes jute-based products.

schemes.title: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Plus (PMKVY+)
schemes.description: Advanced skill training program for youth upskilling.

schemes.title: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises (CGTMSE)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Provides collateral-free credit to MSMEs.

schemes.title: Uttar Pradesh Nari Shakti Yojana
schemes.ministry: Department of Women & Child Development (Uttar Pradesh)
schemes.description: Empowers women through skill training, financial support, and entrepreneurship

schemes.title: Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY)
schemes.description: Develops rural road infrastructure across India.

schemes.title: National Digital Literacy Mission
schemes.description: Promotes digital literacy among citizens across India.

schemes.title: Pradhan Mantri Vaya Vandana Yojana (PMVVY)
schemes.description: Pension scheme for senior citizens aged 60 years and above.
